sentences.target: Wir schlafen heute in der Jugendherberge.

translations.de: Wir schlafen heute in der Jugendherberge.
translations.en: We are sleeping at the youth hostel today.
translations.fr: Ce soir, on dort à l’auberge de jeunesse.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天住在青年旅舍。
translations.yue: 我哋今日住喺青年旅舍。
translations.vi: Tối nay bọn mình ngủ ở hostel.
translations.nl: Vannacht slapen we in het hostel.
translations.hi: आज रात हम हॉस्टल में रुक रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I natt sover vi på vandrerhjemmet.
translations.id: Malam ini kami menginap di hostel.
translations.sv: I natt sover vi på vandrarhemmet.
translations.ro: În seara asta dormim la hostel.
translations.da: I nat sover vi på vandrerhjemmet.
translations.ja: 今夜はユースホステルに泊まります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative serving as the subject.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person plural.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Preposition governing the dative case here (location).
Definite article; feminine dative singular agreeing with 'Jugendherberge'.
Common noun; feminine dative singular object of the preposition 'in' indicating location.

sentences.target: Die Jugendherberge hat leider keine freien Betten.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈjuːɡn̩thɛʁˌbɛʁɡə hat ˈlaɪ̯dɐ ˈkaɪ̯nə ˈfʁaɪ̯ən ˈbɛtən/

translations.de: Die Jugendherberge hat leider keine freien Betten.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈjuːɡn̩thɛʁˌbɛʁɡə hat ˈlaɪ̯dɐ ˈkaɪ̯nə ˈfʁaɪ̯ən ˈbɛtən/
translations.en: The youth hostel unfortunately has no free beds.
translations.es: Por desgracia, el albergue no tiene camas libres.
translations.fr: Malheureusement, l’auberge de jeunesse n’a plus de lits disponibles.
translations.it: Purtroppo l’ostello non ha letti liberi.
translations.zh-Hans: 很遗憾，青年旅舍没有空床位。
translations.yue: 可惜青年旅舍冇空床位。
translations.ru: К сожалению, в хостеле нет свободных мест.
translations.pt: Infelizmente o hostel não tem camas disponíveis.
translations.he: למרבה הצער אין באכסניית הנוער מיטות פנויות.
translations.vi: Tiếc là hostel không còn giường trống.
translations.ar: للأسف لا توجد أسرّة שاغرة في بيت الشباب.
translations.nl: Helaas heeft het hostel geen vrije bedden.
translations.uk: На жаль, у хостелі немає вільних місць.
translations.hu: Sajnos a hostelben nincs szabad ágy.
translations.hi: दुर्भाग्य से हॉस्टल में कोई खाली बिस्तर नहीं है.
translations.pl: Niestety w hostelu nie ma wolnych łóżek.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς το χόστελ δεν έχει ελεύθερα κρεβάτια.
translations.nb: Vandrerhjemmet har dessverre ingen ledige senger.
translations.id: Sayangnya hostel tidak punya tempat tidur kosong.
translations.sv: Tyvärr har vandrarhemmet inga lediga sängar.
translations.ro: Din păcate, hostelul nu are paturi libere.
translations.cs: Bohužel v hostelu nejsou volná lůžka.
translations.da: Vandrerhjemmet har desværre ingen ledige senge.
translations.fi: Valitettavasti hostellissa ei ole vapaita sänkyjä.
translations.ja: 残念ながらユースホステルには空きベッドがありません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular marking the subject.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular serving as the subject.
Main verb expressing possession; present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Sentence adverb expressing speaker attitude.
Negative determiner; plural accusative agreeing with 'Betten'.
Attributive adjective; plural accusative agreeing with 'Betten'.
Common noun; plural accusative as the direct object of 'hat'.

sentences.target: Ich treffe Anna vor der Jugendherberge.

translations.de: Ich treffe Anna vor der Jugendherberge.
translations.en: I’m meeting Anna in front of the youth hostel.
translations.es: Quedo con Anna delante del albergue.
translations.fr: Je retrouve Anna devant l’auberge de jeunesse.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在青年旅舍门口和安娜见面。
translations.yue: 我喺青年旅舍門口同安娜見面。
translations.ru: Я встречаюсь с Анной перед хостелом.
translations.pt: Vou me encontrar com a Anna em frente ao hostel.
translations.he: אני נפגש עם אנה מול אכסניית הנוער.
translations.vi: Mình gặp Anna trước cửa hostel.
translations.nl: Ik spreek met Anna af voor het hostel.
translations.uk: Я зустрічаюся з Анною перед хостелом.
translations.hi: मैं हॉस्टल के बाहर अन्ना से मिल रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Spotykam się z Anną przed hostelem.
translations.el: Συναντώ την Άννα μπροστά στο χόστελ.
translations.id: Aku bertemu Anna di depan hostel.
translations.ro: Mă întâlnesc cu Anna în fața hostelului.
translations.cs: Sejdu se s Annou před hostelem.
translations.da: Jeg mødes med Anna foran vandrerhjemmet.
translations.ja: ユースホステルの前でアンナと待ち合わせします。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative serving as the subject.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular.
Proper noun; feminine accusative as the direct object of 'treffe'.
Preposition governing the dative; indicates location ('in front of').
Definite article; feminine dative singular agreeing with 'Jugendherberge'.
Common noun; feminine dative singular complement of the preposition 'vor'.

sentences.target: Morgen fährt die Klasse zur Jugendherberge.

translations.de: Morgen fährt die Klasse zur Jugendherberge.
translations.en: Tomorrow the class goes to the youth hostel.
translations.es: Mañana la clase va al albergue.
translations.fr: Demain, la classe va à l’auberge de jeunesse.
translations.it: Domani la classe va in ostello.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天班级要去青年旅舍。
translations.yue: 聽日全班會去青年旅舍。
translations.pt: Amanhã a turma vai ao hostel.
translations.vi: Ngày mai lớp sẽ đi đến hostel.
translations.ar: غدًا سيذهب الصف إلى بيت الشباب.
translations.nl: Morgen gaat de klas naar het hostel.
translations.hu: Holnap az osztály a hostelbe megy.
translations.hi: कल कक्षा हॉस्टल जा रही है.
translations.el: Αύριο η τάξη πάει στο χόστελ.
translations.nb: I morgen drar klassen til vandrerhjemmet.
translations.sv: I morgon åker klassen till vandrarhemmet.
translations.da: I morgen tager klassen til vandrerhjemmet.
translations.ja: 明日、クラスはユースホステルに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
